{{Quote|My supervisor has assigned a Wookiee to my warehouse for a few months, and I need to pick up an AlienEnhancer Voxbox to make sure we avoid any mishaps.|An unidentified citizen|<ref name="SWG:PUaV">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=terminal|Explorer|Pick Up a Voxbox}}</ref>}}
'''VoxBox''', sometimes written '''Vox-Box''', was an expensive [[Electronic translator/Legends|electronic translator]] that allowed real-time translation of speech. It facilitated [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]] to converse with other species in [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]]. Cheaper versions were also available, pre-programmed with 12 common phrases in Basic. It was designed for use by species that could understand Basic, but couldn't speak it.
